Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; const chart = Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => /chart|recharts|victory|d3|visx|nivo|apex|plot|graph/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\('Chart libs:', chart\); console.log\('All UI deps:', Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => /ui|radix|base|headless|framer|motion/i.test\(k\)\)\)")

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Admin\\Downloads\\Claude\\Oppo Ecosystem\\oppo-tracker"; $url = \(Get-Content .env.local | Where-Object { $_ -match "^POSTGRES_URL=" } | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace "^POSTGRES_URL=", "" } | Select-Object -First 1\); node -e "const {Pool}=require\('pg'\);const p=new Pool\({connectionString:'$url'}\);p.query\(``ALTER TABLE dealer_incentive_policies ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS plan_id text``\).then\(\(\)=>{console.log\('done'\);p.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);p.end\(\)}\)")
